Surname.jp: おっとりゆるふわ獣人姫

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52121_0]</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52121_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52121_0]</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52121_0]턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52121_0]</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52121_0]ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52121_0]</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52121_0]回合</color>。

description.en: With a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52122_0]</color> chance, decreases all enemies' <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52122_0]</color> turns.
description.kr: <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52122_0]</color> 확률로 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>와 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52122_0]턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>と<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52122_0]</color>の確率で、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52122_0]</color>ターンの間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 以<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52122_0]</color>的概率在<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52122_0]</color>回合内降低全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>和<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52123_0]</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Silenced</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52123_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52123_0]</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52123_0]턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>침묵</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52123_0]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>沈黙</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52123_0]ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52123_0]</color>的几率使其陷入<color=#28d9ed>沉默</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52123_0]回合</color>。
